message:
feat(gen_server): add SystemMsg/Info channel and refactor supervision to borrow outcomes

GenServer Info channel (bd-188ey):
- Introduce SystemMsg enum with three OTP-style out-of-band variants:
  Down (monitor fired, carries completion virtual time + notification),
  Exit (link propagation, carries exit virtual time + source task + reason),
  Timeout (deterministic tick with virtual time + user-defined id)
- SystemMsg::vt() accessor returns the virtual time for deterministic
  ordering regardless of variant
- Add associated type GenServer::Info (recommended default: SystemMsg)
  and GenServer::handle_info() callback with async no-op default
- Extend Envelope<S> with Info variant for unified mailbox dispatch
- Import DownNotification/DownReason from monitor module and Time type
- Update module doc to document three message types (Call/Cast/Info)

Supervision outcome-by-reference refactor:
- Change Supervisor::on_failure() and on_failure_with_budget() to accept
  &Outcome<(), ()> instead of owned Outcome, eliminating unnecessary
  clones at the call site in actor.rs
- Extract record_evidence() helper method on Supervisor to centralize
  evidence ledger writes (timestamp, task_id, region_id, outcome,
  strategy_kind, decision, binding_constraint)
- Extract decide_err_with_budget() helper that encapsulates the
  Err-specific strategy dispatch (Stop/Restart/Escalate) with budget
  checking, returning a (decision, constraint) tuple
- Flatten the match arms in on_failure_with_budget to use tuple
  construction for monotone severity cases, delegating the Err case
  to decide_err_with_budget()
- Minor Display impl reformatting for BindingConstraint variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
